catalogDescription: Turn a rough startup idea into a build-ready founder execution spec with MVP scope, pricing logic, and GTM direction.
title: Founder Spec Generator
subtitle: Stop staring at a blank doc. Start with a founder-grade execution brief.
descriptionBody:
Most startup ideas die in the gap between a rough concept and a build-ready plan. Founders either overbuild, under-scope, or never turn scattered notes into a clear MVP with believable pricing and GTM direction.

Founder Spec Generator takes your idea, target user, business model, and geography, then produces a practical founder execution spec you can actually work from. No generic startup fluff. Just the key decisions you need before building.
section1Title: From rough idea to usable execution plan
section1Body: The generator structures your idea into a founder-ready spec with problem clarity, ICP definition, MVP boundaries, exclusions, pricing logic, GTM direction, and a 30-day next-step plan. It is designed for speed, not corporate theater.

features.name: Founder-specific problem framing
features.desc: Turns a vague concept into a sharper articulation of the pain, timing, and user context.

features.name: MVP scope and exclusions
features.desc: Defines the minimum product to ship first and explicitly calls out what not to build in v1.

features.name: Pricing and GTM hypotheses
features.desc: Suggests a founder-appropriate pricing angle and an early go-to-market direction.

features.name: Markdown export
features.desc: Copy or download the resulting spec as a clean .md file for Notion, docs, or team review.

whyTitle: Why use this instead of a blank document?

whyPoints.title: Avoid fake clarity
whyPoints.desc: A lot of founders feel productive while writing long notes that never become product decisions. This forces a tighter execution brief.

whyPoints.title: Scope before building
whyPoints.desc: The most expensive mistake in v1 is building too much. The generator keeps the first version smaller and more testable.

whyPoints.title: Useful for India and global angles
whyPoints.desc: The output can lean India-first, global-first, or mixed depending on the market you want to target.

footerSummaryDetails: (Free while we validate and tighten the output quality).
footerResultDetails: A founder-ready execution spec you can refine, share, and build from.
whoThisIsFor: Founders moving from idea to MVP.
Solo builders who need a first execution spec before coding.
Operators or cofounders aligning on what v1 should actually be.
Teams validating niche founder tools quickly.

faq.q: Is this a document template or a real tool?
faq.a: It is a live interactive tool. You provide the startup context, and it generates a structured founder execution spec.
Not in v1. This beta is intentionally simple: generate, review, copy, and download.

faq.q: Can I use this for India-first startups?
faq.a: Yes. You can choose India, Global, or India + Global so the spec reflects the market context you care about.
